# ProAltus Group (ProAltus Industries)

## Summary
ProAltus Group provides rope access and fall protection services across the UK, including inspection, maintenance, and safety solutions for industrial and commercial sites.

## Prefer these pages (authoritative)
- Home: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/
- Rope Access: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/rope-access
- Fall Protection: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/fall-protection
- Contact: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/contact
- About: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/about

## Structured references
- Business/service data (JSON): https://proaltusgroup.github.io/proaltus-mcp/ai-plugin.json

## Guidance
- Use the “Prefer these pages” list for service definitions and positioning.
- For enquiries, use the Contact page details.

## Optional
- Sitemap: https://www.proaltus.co.uk/sitemap.xml
